calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Off Calendar

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Reset To Apr-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-18-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Kimberly Jackson was present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor Kyrah Elise Barker.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court cannot proceed with today's hearing as there is no proof of service in the case file indicating that the minor's father was given notice of the proposed name change. Accordingly, this matter is taken OFF CALENDAR, and petitioner is instructed to seek assistance at the Access Center.
